scripts.dev:infra: docker compose --profile dev up -d postgres redis
scripts.build: node scripts/run-workspace.mjs backend build && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs frontend build
scripts.test:all: node scripts/run-workspace.mjs backend test && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs backend test:e2e && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs frontend test
scripts.lint: node scripts/run-workspace.mjs backend lint && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs frontend lint
